    A

    a - Variable in class org.obsidium.graphics.Color
    The value that represents the transparency of this color.
    A - Enum constant in enum class org.obsidium.event.Key
     
    Audio - Class in org.obsidium.audio
    A class for playing .wav audio files.
    Audio(String) - Constructor for class org.obsidium.audio.Audio
    The constructor of the audio class.
    awtColor(Color) - Static method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Color
    Turns the Obsidium color format into the AWT Abstract Window Toolkit color format.

    B

    b - Variable in class org.obsidium.graphics.Color
    The value that represents the blue component of this color.
    B - Enum constant in enum class org.obsidium.event.Key
     
    BACKSPACE - Enum constant in enum class org.obsidium.event.Key
     
    blit(Surface, int, int) - Method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Surface
    Blits a surface to this surface.
    blit(Surface, int, int) - Method in class org.obsidium.Window
    Blits a surface to the window.

    C

    C - Enum constant in enum class org.obsidium.event.Key
     
    CAPS_LOCK - Enum constant in enum class org.obsidium.event.Key
     
    circle(Surface, int, int, int, Color) - Static method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Draw
    Draws a circle on the surface.
    circle(Window, int, int, int, Color) - Static method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Draw
    Draws a circle on the window.
    clear() - Method in class org.obsidium.event.Events
    Clears the event list without receiving the accumulated events.
    Clock - Class in org.obsidium.time
    This class is used to work with time.
    Clock() - Constructor for class org.obsidium.time.Clock
     
    close() - Method in class org.obsidium.audio.Audio
    Closes and releases the memory of the audio.
    closeWindow(Window) - Static method in class org.obsidium.Obsidium
     
    Color - Class in org.obsidium.graphics
    A class that stores color values in integer form 0-255.
    Color() - Constructor for class org.obsidium.graphics.Color
    Creates a color object with the values: r = 0 g = 0 b = 0 a = 255 : opague
    Color(int, int, int) - Constructor for class org.obsidium.graphics.Color
    Creates a color object with the specified values.
    Color(int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class org.obsidium.graphics.Color
    Creates a color object with the specified values.
    createWindow() - Static method in class org.obsidium.Obsidium
    Creates a new window with the propertys: a resolution of 800x600 centered on the screen stopProgramOnClose = false
    createWindow(int, int, String) - Static method in class org.obsidium.Obsidium
    Creates a new window at the center of the screen with stopProgramOnClose = false.
    createWindow(int, int, String, boolean) - Static method in class org.obsidium.Obsidium
    Creates a new window at the center of the screen.
    createWindow(int, int, String, int, int) - Static method in class org.obsidium.Obsidium
    Creates a new window with stopProgramOnClose = false.
    createWindow(int, int, String, int, int, boolean) - Static method in class org.obsidium.Obsidium
    Creates a new window with full configuration.

    dispose() - Method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Surface
    Frees some memory of the surface.
    dot(Vector2D, Vector2D) - Static method in class org.obsidium.geometry.Vector2D
    Computes the dot product of this vector and the specified vector.
    dot(Vector2, Vector2) - Static method in class org.obsidium.geometry.Vector2
    Computes the dot product of this vector and the specified vector.
    DOWN - Enum constant in enum class org.obsidium.event.Key

    A class with only static members that is used for drawing shapes to the window or a surface.

    fill(Surface, Color) - Static method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Draw
    Fills the surface with a specified color.
    fill(Window, Color) - Static method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Draw
    Fills the window with a specified color.
    flip() - Method in class org.obsidium.Window
    Shows the content on the screen that you have been drawing to.
    Font - Class in org.obsidium.graphics
    A class that represents a font with methods to render text with this font.
    Font(int, float) - Constructor for class org.obsidium.graphics.Font
    Creates a font from a built-in type.
    Font(String, float) - Constructor for class org.obsidium.graphics.Font
    Creates a font of a .ttf file at the given path.

    G

    g - Variable in class org.obsidium.graphics.Color
    The value that represents the green component of this color.
    G - Enum constant in enum class org.obsidium.event.Key
     
    get() - Method in class org.obsidium.event.Events
    Returns all the events that happend in this frame.
    getBufferedImage() - Method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Surface
    Returns the bufferd image of this surface.
    getCenter() - Method in class org.obsidium.Window
    Returns the center of the window, relative to its own coordinate system.
    getDeltaTime() - Method in class org.obsidium.time.Clock
    Returns the time taken to complete the last frame.
    getFPS() - Method in class org.obsidium.time.Clock
    Returns the current frames per second.
    getGraphics2D() - Method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Surface
    Returns the drawing graphics used to draw things on this surface.
    getGraphics2D() - Method in class org.obsidium.Window
    ---advanced--- Returns the screen's Graphics2D.
    getHeight() - Method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Surface
    Returns the height of the image in pixels.
    getHeight() - Method in class org.obsidium.Window
    Returns the height in pixels of the window.
    getMousePos() - Static method in class org.obsidium.Obsidium
    Returns the coordinates of the mouse relative to the primary screen.
    getMousePosX() - Static method in class org.obsidium.Obsidium
    Returns the x coordinate of the mouse relative to the primary screen.
    getMousePosY() - Static method in class org.obsidium.Obsidium
    Returns the y coordinate of the mouse relative to the primary screen.
    getPath() - Method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Font
    Returns the path of the font.
    getPos() - Method in class org.obsidium.event.Mouse
    Returns the position of the mouse relative to the window.
    getPos() - Method in class org.obsidium.Window
    Returns the positoin of the window, relative to the primary screen.
    getPosX() - Method in class org.obsidium.event.Mouse
    Returns the individual x-coordinate of the mouse relative to the screen.
    getPosX() - Method in class org.obsidium.Window
    Returns the individual x-coordinate of the window, relative to the primary screen.
    getPosY() - Method in class org.obsidium.event.Mouse
    Returns the individual y-coordinate of the mouse relative to the screen.
    getPosY() - Method in class org.obsidium.Window
    Returns the individual y-coordinate of the window, relative to the primary screen.
    getPressed() - Method in class org.obsidium.event.Events
    Returns an array of keys that were pressed this frame.
    getScreenSize() - Static method in class org.obsidium.Obsidium
    Returns the size of the primary screen.
    getSize() - Method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Font
    Returns the font size.
    getTitle() - Method in class org.obsidium.Window
    Returns the windows title.
    getType() - Method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Font
    Returns the type of font.
    getVolume() - Method in class org.obsidium.audio.Audio
    Returns the volume of the audio.
    getWidth() - Method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Surface
    Returns the width of the image in pixels.
    getWidth() - Method in class org.obsidium.Window
    Returns the width in pixels of the window.

    line(Surface, int, int, int, int, float, Color) - Static method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Draw
    Draws a line to the surface.
    line(Surface, int, int, int, int, Color) - Static method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Draw
    Draws a line to the surface with a thickness of 1.
    line(Window, int, int, int, int, float, Color) - Static method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Draw
    Draws a line to the window.
    line(Window, int, int, int, int, Color) - Static method in class org.obsidium.graphics.Draw
    Draws a line to the window with a thickness of 1.
    load(String) - Static method in class org.obsidium.image.Image
    Loads the image, that can be found in the specified path, in a Surface.
    logo() - Static method in class org.obsidium.image.Image
    Returns a surface that contains tho logo of Obsidium.

    Pauses the audio that is currently playing.

    Plays and loops the audio.

    This method adds the 2 specified vectors and returns the result.
    plus(Vector2D) - Method in class org.obsidium.geometry.Vector2D
    This method adds the 2 specified vectors and returns the result.

    Draws a filled in polygon on the surface.

    Draws a filled in polygon on the window.

    Resumes the audio that is currently playing.

    Rotates the desired surface by a set angle.

    tick() - Method in class org.obsidium.time.Clock
    Returns how many milliseconds this frame took to complete.
    tick(double) - Method in class org.obsidium.time.Clock
    Synchronizes the games loop to a specific frame rate that you set.
    times(Vector2) - Method in class org.obsidium.geometry.Vector2
    This method multiplies the 2 specified vectors and returns the result.
    times(Vector2D) - Method in class org.obsidium.geometry.Vector2D
    This method multiplies the 2 specified vectors and returns the result.
    toggle() - Method in class org.obsidium.audio.Audio
    Toggles between pausing/resuming.

    A class with only static members that is used to transform images(Surface).

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class org.obsidium.event.Key

    values() - Static method in enum class org.obsidium.event.Key
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class org.obsidium.event.Type
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    Vector2 - Class in org.obsidium.geometry
    A class that can be instantiated to hold 2 integers that represent the coordinates x and y.
    Vector2(int, int) - Constructor for class org.obsidium.geometry.Vector2
    The constructor of the Vector2 class that stores the x and y coordinates in integer form.
    Vector2D - Class in org.obsidium.geometry
    A class that can be instantiated to hold 2 doubles that represent the coordinates x and y.
    Vector2D(double, double) - Constructor for class org.obsidium.geometry.Vector2D
    The constructor of the Vector2 class that stores the x and y coordinates in double form.
